name: create_project
description: Create a new translation project in Smartcat. You must specify a project name, source language, and one or more target languages. You can optionally configure the workflow stages (translation, editing, proofreading), assign translators, and attach translation memories. The project will be created in 'created' status, ready for document uploads.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the translation project. Should be descriptive, e.g., 'Website Localization Q1 2025'.

parameters.name: sourceLanguage
parameters.description: Source language code in Smartcat format. Examples: 'en' for English, 'en-US' for American English, 'de' for German.

parameters.name: targetLanguages
parameters.description: Array of target language codes to translate into. Example: ['es', 'fr', 'de', 'ja'].

parameters.name: workflowStages
parameters.description: Array of workflow stage names defining the translation process. Options: 'Translation', 'Editing', 'Proofreading'. Default: ['Translation'].

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description of the project providing context for translators.

parameters.name: deadline
parameters.description: Project deadline in ISO 8601 format. Example: '2025-12-31T23:59:59Z'.

parameters.name: useMT
parameters.description: Whether to use machine translation as a first pass. Default: false.

body.name: Mobile App Localization v2.5
body.description: Localization of mobile app UI strings for version 2.5 release
